## Quality Check

- [ ] Core job solution-agnostic and stable
- [ ] Core job validated with 3 cited sources
- [ ] All 8 job map steps covered
- [ ] Job map validated with 3 cited sources
- [ ] Outcomes within each step are mutually exclusive
- [ ] Cross-step redundancy check completed
- [ ] 5-15 outcomes per step
- [ ] Each "Relevant" tag cites specific Phase 1 root cause
- [ ] Relevant outcomes validated with 3 external sources each
- [ ] Every Phase 1 barrier maps to a job step
